vocabulary.example_sentence: Clap the rhythm before you sing the first line.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 唱第一句前先拍出节奏。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The folk song tells a story passed down for generations.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这首民歌讲述代代相传的故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Traditional instruments opened the school music festival.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 传统乐器拉开了学校音乐节序幕。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Her favourite pop track has a chorus everyone can sing along to.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她最爱的流行歌有一段人人能跟着唱的副歌。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Late-night jazz filled the café while students tapped their feet.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 深夜爵士乐充满咖啡馆，学生们用脚打节拍。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He wrote a rap about studying hard and dreaming big.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他写了一段关于努力学习和远大梦想的 rap。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please leave a kind comment after the online performance.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在线演出后请留下友善的评论。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The whole hall began to sing along to the golden oldie.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 全场开始跟着那首金色老歌一起唱。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Read the lyric slowly to catch the poet's mood.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 慢慢读歌词，体会诗人的情绪。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The electric guitar solo brought the crowd to its feet.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电吉他独奏让观众站了起来。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Debbie borrowed an electric guitar for the school rock night.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 黛比为学校摇滚之夜借了一把电吉他。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Chopin's pieces sound rich even on a simple keyboard.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 肖邦的曲子即使用简单电子琴也显得很丰满。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A bright trumpet note signalled the start of the parade.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 小号一声亮音宣告游行开始。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Each performer chose a different style for the same song.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 同首歌每位演奏者选了不同风格。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Clarice gave a performance that earned the highest rating.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 克拉丽斯的演出获得了最高评分。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Golden lights shone on the stage during the finale.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 压轴时金色灯光洒在舞台上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: As a music lover, he collects tapes of live concerts.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 作为音乐爱好者，他收藏现场音乐会磁带。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Schumann wrote romantic pieces filled with deep feeling.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 舒曼写了充满深情的浪漫作品。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The performer bowed while the audience tapped their feet.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 演奏者鞠躬时，观众用脚打着节拍。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Couples dance to folk tunes at the town fair.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 集市上情侣随着民间曲调跳舞。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Purple stage lights matched the mood of the ballad.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 紫色舞台灯配合了民谣的气氛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The poet set his words to a gentle melody.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 诗人把文字配上了温柔的旋律。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A policewoman directed traffic outside the concert hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 一名女警察在音乐厅外指挥交通。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The deaf pianist felt rhythm through the floorboards.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 那位聋人钢琴家通过地板感受节奏。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The composer revised the score until every bar felt right.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 作曲家改谱直到每一小节都恰到好处。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Electronic sounds blended with trumpet and drums.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电子音效与小号和鼓融合在一起。

vocabulary.chinese: 下载；已下载的数据资料
vocabulary.example_sentence: Download the track legally before you sing it in class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在课堂上唱之前请合法下载音轨。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The new album received a five-star rating online.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新专辑在网上获得五星评分。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Hats off to the gifted pianist who played from memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 向凭记忆演奏的有天赋钢琴家致敬。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Many call Chopin a genius of the piano.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 许多人称肖邦是钢琴天才。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The young pianist travelled from Poland to study in Vienna.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 年轻钢琴家从波兰赴维也纳学习。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Gifted students still need daily practice on their instrument.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有天赋的学生仍须每天练乐器。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She tried to outdo her last performance with a harder piece.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她选更难曲目，想超越上次演出。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Travel can widen your taste in music and art.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 旅行能拓宽你在音乐与艺术上的品味。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Soul music carries emotion straight to the listener's heart.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 灵魂乐把情感直送进听众心里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Never look down on folk songs—they hold a nation's memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 别轻视民歌——它们承载民族记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He spoke Polish at home and English at school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他在家说波兰语，在学校说英语。

vocabulary.chinese: 特征；品质；典型的；独特的
vocabulary.example_sentence: Long lyrical lines are a characteristic of Chopin's style.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 悠长的抒情线条是肖邦风格的特征。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Her valuable collection includes tapes of rare live jazz.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她珍贵的收藏里有稀有现场爵士磁带。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The choir proudly sang the school song at the funeral service.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 合唱团在葬礼上自豪地唱了校歌。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mourners heard a quiet piano piece at the funeral.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吊唁者在葬礼上听到一首轻柔钢琴曲。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Young and old danced together when the band played pop hits.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 乐队演奏流行金曲时，老老少少一起跳舞。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Teaching music became her profession after years on stage.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 多年舞台生涯后，教音乐成了她的职业。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Chopin's contribution to piano music is still studied today.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 肖邦对钢琴音乐的贡献至今仍被研究。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The cartoon used a rap song to explain music history.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 动画片用一首 rap 讲解音乐史。

vocabulary.chinese: 公平的；合理的；露天游乐场；集市
vocabulary.example_sentence: The summer fair featured folk bands from nearby towns.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 夏日集市有附近城镇的民间乐队。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The jury picked the winner fair and square after every performance.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 评委在每场演出后光明正大地选出了胜者。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He found an old tape of his schoolmate singing at a talent show.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他找到一盘旧磁带，录的是同学在才艺赛上的演唱。

vocabulary.chinese: 用（手指或脚）打节拍；轻敲；水龙头；轻拍
vocabulary.example_sentence: Tap your finger on the desk to keep time with the rhythm.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 用手指在桌上轻敲以跟上节奏。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Everyone began to tap their feet when the drums kicked in.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 鼓点一起，大家就开始用脚打节拍。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The champion returned home to a parade in her honour.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 冠军回家时，人们为她举行了游行庆祝。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Move each finger independently to play the fast passage.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每个手指独立运动才能弹好快速乐段。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My schoolmate and I downloaded the same practice track.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我和同学下载了同一首练习曲。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Nowadays many performers share live clips on social media.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 如今许多演奏者在社交媒体分享现场片段。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Use your imagination to picture the scene behind the lyric.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 用想象力想象歌词背后的场景。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Clarice chose a romantic ballad for the final round.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 克拉丽斯在决赛选了一首浪漫民谣。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Debbie commented that the trumpet section was too loud.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 黛比评论说小号声部太响了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Robert Schumann encouraged young Chopin in Vienna.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 罗伯特·舒曼在维也纳鼓励年轻的肖邦。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Frédéric Chopin composed mostly for the piano.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗雷德里克·肖邦的作品主要为钢琴而作。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Poland celebrates Chopin with concerts and statues.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 波兰用音乐会和雕像纪念肖邦。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Vienna was a centre of European music in the nineteenth century.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 十九世纪维也纳是欧洲音乐中心。
